ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the asset during the period */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset during the period */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of assets traded during the period */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset this data belongs to */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for stock splits, dividends, etc. */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market trading price */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* After-hours trading price */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the period */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., exchange, API provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset (e.g., stock name) */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., stock, bond, commodity) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the asset */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the asset */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) */,
  "isin_cusip" TEXT /* Combined ISIN and CUSIP for unique identification */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the asset is traded */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being traded */,
  "trade_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the asset was traded */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order related to the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., executed, pending, canceled) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Trading fee associated with the trade */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy used (if applicable) */,
  "execution_venue" TEXT /* Venue where the trade was executed (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset added to the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist entry was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User notes or comments about the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price threshold) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was set */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "moving_average" REAL /* Moving average value for the asset */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility measure for the asset */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative Strength Index (RSI) value */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) value */,
  "bollinger_bands" TEXT /* Bollinger Bands data */,
  "fibonacci_levels" TEXT /* Fibonacci retracement levels */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)
